description: Public-safe schema for admitting candidate novel hypotheses into the Mirror Cartographer discovery pipeline. This is research-organization infrastructure only, not medical or veterinary advice.

field_contract.phenomenon_id: Identifier for the unresolved phenomenon packet that produced this hypothesis.
field_contract.hypothesis_statement: One concrete claim that can later be mechanized and tested.
field_contract.novelty_basis: Why this is not merely a restatement of an observation or existing gate output.
field_contract.mechanism_hint: A provisional causal or computational bridge, stated without personal or clinical advice.
field_contract.measurable_variables: List of at least two measurable variables with units or operational definitions.
field_contract.alternative_explanations: List of at least two plausible alternatives that could explain the same observation.
field_contract.missingness: Known gaps that prevent promotion to mechanism or prediction stages.
field_contract.revision_reason: Why the packet was created or updated.
field_contract.falsification_route: A concrete way this hypothesis could fail.
field_contract.next_executable_action: One immediate action that can move the claim to mechanism, prediction, fixture, or test.

acceptance_criteria: Hypothesis statement is a single testable claim rather than a theme.
At least two measurable variables are provided.
At least two alternative explanations are provided.
Novelty basis explains what inference becomes available beyond the source phenomenon.
Falsification route names an observable failure condition.
No private, personal, household, health, animal-care, financial, location, relationship, credential, or raw transcript detail is present.
Medical or animal-care relevant packets are framed only as research organization or question-prep infrastructure.
